results.description:
An Apple Books Classic edition.

L. Frank Baum’s imagination surfaces for one last dazzling adventure through his colorful, lovingly detailed fairyland in the final Oz book. Princess Ozma and her loyal friend Dorothy have traveled to a distant corner of Oz to negotiate a peace between two warring tribes. But both sides refuse to listen, opting instead to imprison the pair inside a domed city that sinks beneath the waters of a remote lake.

Two of Oz’s most beloved figures have been captured, so it’s up to a third to save them. Glinda the Good leads a massive team of memorable characters from throughout the entire series on a determined rescue mission. A celebration of the courage, kindness, and wonderfully odd ideas that make this series so special, Glinda of Oz is a graceful and imaginative farewell.
